mapper.select:
select ca.*, c.likes, u.username, u.user_avatar, a.username as adminName, a.user_avatar as adminAvatar from comment_audit ca left join comments c on ca.comment_id = c.id left join users u on c.user_id = u.id left join users a on ca.admin_id = a.id
AND a.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{adminName}, '%')
AND ca.comment_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{content}, '%')
ORDER BY ca.created_at
ASC
DESC
